reason: Approved design defines research-first scope, terminology, and non-goals.
Implementation must execute rollout steps in order and update status.
Requirement explains user-visible workflow capability and boundaries.
Roadmap module split and sequencing are hard constraints.
Research-first Integration contract is a hard roadmap companion constraint.
Context manifests can carry cited research-first explore artifacts.
Research role remains bounded to explore evidence and no final decisions.
Exploration evidence identifies Trellis research-first/context behavior as an absorption source.
